AI_DataViz_Workflow__: Depending on the project, I like to get an end-to-end outline about how I should go about the tasks involved. I like to ask how I can clean, wrangle, analyze, and visualize data well as possible—questions like which variables can be measured against which ones, what calculated fields I can generate based on the data, which visualizations are the best for the project data and how many variables can be plotted in a single chart, and how I can craft an overall story from the data and context to present to stakeholders ensuring that it meets their requirements and aligns with their business objectives.
